criteria.name: Correct explanation of task flow
criteria.description: Answer correctly explains how tasks move from producer to worker.

criteria.name: Mentions worker execution
criteria.description: Answer includes how workers consume and execute tasks.

criteria.name: Clarity
criteria.description: Answer is clear and logically structured.

final_answer: A task is created using apply_async or delay. The task is packaged with its arguments and metadata, sent to a broker, placed into a queue, then picked up by a worker. The worker processes the queue, deserializes the task, executes it, and stores the result after completion.
description: Explains how a task moves from producer to worker execution

evidence.name: Mentions worker role
evidence.description: Correctly identifies that workers execute tasks

evidence.name: Clarity and coherence
evidence.description: Answer is understandable and logically structured
